creator: renaud+freebsd@waldura.org
text:
I built and ran Tesseract OCR, Google's open source OCR project, on FreeBSD 6.1. I'm reposting my findings here, with the vague hope they motivate a port or at least help a bit. 

See http://sourceforge.net/forum/forum.php?thread_id=1657838&forum_id=534360.
